data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Time to make a decision increases with the number of choices.
data.technical_spec: Cluster similar actions and simplify choices per screen.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Time to acquire a target is a function of distance and size.
data.technical_spec: Design interactive elements to be large enough and close enough for easy access.

data.title: Gestalt Principles
data.description: Users perceive graphical elements as wholes.
data.technical_spec: Incorporate proximity, similarity, and continuity in design.

data.title: Jakob’s Law
data.description: Users prefer your site to work the same way as all the other sites they already know.
data.technical_spec: Follow conventional design patterns and user interface behaviors.

data.title: Law of Similarity
data.description: Similar elements are perceived as part of the same group.
data.technical_spec: Use consistent visual elements to cue users.
